footer.schoolName: Kajiado Adventist School and Rescue Center
footer.description: A Seventh-day Adventist institution offering holistic, competency-based education.
footer.copyrightSuffix: Kajiado Adventist School and Rescue Center. All rights reserved.

about.historyText: Founded in the year 2000, Kajiado Adventist School has grown from a small community school to a beacon of hope, serving hundreds of students with a commitment to academic and moral development.
about.missionText: To provide holistic education rooted in Christian values, fostering academic excellence, character development, and social responsibility.
about.visionText: A center of excellence recognized for nurturing morally upright, competent, and innovative learners ready to impact society positively.

testimonials.name: Mary Kamau
testimonials.text: Kajiado Adventist School and Rescue Center has transformed my child’s learning experience!

testimonials.name: Samuel Kiptoo
testimonials.text: I enjoy the learning environment and all the extracurricular activities offered here.

testimonials.name: Maria Mutheu
testimonials.text: Kajiado Adventist School and Rescue Center has transformed my child’s learning experience!

testimonials.name: Sammy Kuria
testimonials.text: I enjoy the learning environment and all the extracurricular activities offered here.

admissions.intro: Kajiado Adventist School and Rescue Center welcomes learners into a Christ-centered, disciplined, and nurturing learning environment.
processSteps: Fill in the online admission form
admissions.helpText: Contact the school office for guidance on admissions and enrollment.

news.title: Science Fair Winners Announced
news.content: Congratulations to all participants in the 2025 Science Fair. Our students showcased amazing STEM projects.

news.title: New Computer Lab Inauguration
news.content: The school inaugurated a state-of-the-art computer lab to enhance digital literacy for all students.

events.title: Annual Sports Day
events.description: Join us for an exciting day of sports and competitions.

events.title: Parent-Teacher Meeting
events.description: Meet teachers and discuss student progress and school initiatives.

parents.intro: We believe in a strong partnership between the school and parents to nurture learners academically, morally, and spiritually.
parents.ptaText: The PTA supports school programs, promotes parent engagement, and contributes to the holistic development of learners.
parents.portalText: Access academic reports, attendance records, fee statements, and official school communication.

faqs.q: How do parents communicate with teachers?
faqs.a: Parents can communicate through official school emails, scheduled meetings, and student diaries.
Fees are paid via approved bank accounts. Full details are available in the fee structure document.

faqs.q: Does the school observe the Sabbath?
faqs.a: Yes. As a Seventh-day Adventist institution, the school observes the Sabbath from Friday sunset to Saturday sunset.

parents.valuesText: We are guided by Christian principles that emphasize discipline, respect, integrity, and service, in alignment with Seventh-day Adventist beliefs.

activities.name: Football
activities.description: Join our competitive football teams and inter-school tournaments.

activities.name: Music & Choir
activities.description: Develop musical talents and participate in school concerts.

activities.name: Drama Club
activities.description: Act in school plays and cultural productions.

activities.name: Science & Robotics Club
activities.description: Explore STEM through experiments and robotics projects.

activities.name: Debate Club
activities.description: Enhance critical thinking and public speaking skills.

curriculum.intro: Kajiado Adventist School and Rescue Center follows the Competency-Based Curriculum (CBC) as approved by the Kenya Institute of Curriculum Development (KICD).

pre-primary.title: Pre-Primary (PP1 & PP2)
pre-primary.description: The Pre-Primary curriculum focuses on holistic child development through play, creativity, and foundational competencies.

primary.title: Primary School
primary.description: Primary education builds foundational literacy, numeracy, creativity, and citizenship skills.

junior-school.title: Junior High School
junior-school.description: Junior School prepares learners for pathways by strengthening competencies, values, and career awareness.

senior-school.title: Senior School
senior-school.description: Senior School focuses on career pathways, specialization, and real-world problem-solving.
